CX DevKit

Namespace CXEX.CLI.Commands

Classes

BuildCommand
BuildCommand.Settings
CheckCommand
CheckCommand.Settings
CompileCommand

Compiles an X source file (.x) to an ELF, ready for cxk build to package as CXEX. Pipeline: [abi.x prelude] + source -> Lexer -> Parser -> Resolver -> TypeChecker -> X86Emitter (-> .s) -> i686-elf-gcc assemble -> link @0x400000.
